summary: Iteration 90: UI Improvements Testing - All tests passed. Signup form shows all labels in English (FULL NAME, BIRTH DATE, PREFERRED CONTACT, PHONE, EMAIL, PASSWORD). Birth date uses text input with dd/mm/yyyy mask (not native date picker). Phone field has country code dropdown with flags and proper masks for US, BR, PT, GB, ES, FR, DE, MX, AR, CO, CL. WhatsApp is default selected. Settings page account panel has same country picker and date mask functionality. Backend APIs correctly store/retrieve birth_date (ISO), phone (with country code), preferred_contact in tenant settings JSONB.
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx: COUNTRIES array has 12 countries with proper masks and placeholders
Login.jsx: applyMask() function correctly applies phone masks based on country
Login.jsx: formatDateInput() auto-formats date as dd/mm/yyyy while typing
Login.jsx: dateDisplayToISO() converts dd/mm/yyyy to ISO yyyy-mm-dd for backend
Login.jsx: Birth date input type='text' with placeholder='dd/mm/yyyy' (not native date picker)
Login.jsx: Country picker dropdown with data-testid='country-dropdown' and country-{code} for each option
Settings.jsx: Same COUNTRIES array and mask functions as Login.jsx
Settings.jsx: isoToDisplay() converts ISO date to dd/mm/yyyy for display
Settings.jsx: parsePhoneCountry() extracts country and number from stored phone string
Settings.jsx: Profile card has hover overlay with Camera icon and 'Change' text
auth.py: Extended fields (birth_date, phone, preferred_contact) stored in tenant settings JSONB
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI improvements verified: 1) Signup form labels all in English. 2) Birth date uses text input with dd/mm/yyyy mask (formatDateInput function). 3) Phone has country picker with 12 countries (US, BR, PT, GB, ES, FR, DE, IT, MX, AR, CO, CL) each with proper mask and placeholder. 4) WhatsApp default selected. 5) Settings page has same components. 6) Backend stores birth_date as ISO (yyyy-mm-dd), phone with country code prefix, preferred_contact in tenant settings JSONB.

signup_labels_english.details: All labels in English: FULL NAME, BIRTH DATE, PREFERRED CONTACT, PHONE, EMAIL, PASSWORD

signup_birthdate_text_input.details: Birth date uses type='text' with placeholder='dd/mm/yyyy' (not native date picker)

signup_country_picker.details: Country picker shows flag + dial code, dropdown has US, BR, PT, GB, ES, FR, DE, IT, MX, AR, CO, CL

signup_country_placeholder_change.details: Selecting country changes phone placeholder (US: (727) 459-2334, BR: (11) 99999-9999, etc.)

signup_whatsapp_default.details: WhatsApp button has green border styling by default

settings_profile_card_hover.details: Profile card shows 'Change' text with camera icon on hover

settings_birthdate_text_input.details: Settings birth date uses type='text' with placeholder='dd/mm/yyyy'

settings_country_picker.details: Settings has country picker with same countries as signup

settings_phone_masked.details: Phone displays with proper mask based on country code

api_profile_update_phone_formats.details: PUT /api/auth/profile accepts phone with various country codes (+1, +55, +44)
